headline: Scott Galloway Says the SpaceX IPO Has ‘No Anchor.’ Here’s Why I Think He’s Wrong.
summary: Scott Galloway has made a pointed case against the SpaceX IPO. His core argument deserves a fair hearing before I explain why I think he lands wrong. Galloway’s Case, Fairly Stated SpaceX’s valuation has run from roughly $350 billion in May 2025, to $800 billion in December 2025, to $1.25 trillion in February 2026, now ... Scott Galloway Says the SpaceX IPO Has ‘No Anchor.’ Here’s Why I Think He’s Wrong.

headline: Will Offshore Setback and New Demand Streams Change GE Vernova's (GEV) Energy Transition Narrative?
summary: In recent days, GE Vernova has featured prominently at high-profile industry conferences and in media coverage, while also facing a court-ordered injunction preventing its renewables arm from exiting a major offshore wind maintenance contract linked to a prior turbine blade failure. At the same time, commentators have underscored GE Vernova's expanding role in nuclear power and strong demand for its gas turbines serving data center power needs, highlighting the breadth of its energy...

headline: Regulatory Breakthroughs Unlocked For U.S. Nuclear
summary: The NRC finalized a new path for reactor licensing last month. This new pathway, Part 53, marks the first new reactor licensing framework in decades.

raw.headline: Regulatory Breakthroughs Unlocked For U.S. Nuclear

headline: How to Invest in AI Power Now—And What to Avoid
summary: Utilities plan $1.4 trillion in capital expenditures through 2030, a 21% increase, driven by AI’s rising power demands.  Global data center electricity demand is projected to double by 2030 to 945 terawatt-hours, with over 800 new centers in development.  AI power infrastructure companies like GE Vernova (up 38%) and Vertiv (up 80%) have strong backlogs and high valuations.

summary: MADRID, SPAIN - GE Vernova Inc. announced today that it has signed an agreement to provide 15 of its 6.1 MW-158m* workhorse wind turbines to power the Santa Maria de las Fuentes wind farm in Spain,...
